Interface Ray

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

A 3D ray that begins at a point and extends infinitely along a line in one direction only.

[Guid("0CD38CBA-1C89-11D4-9F5C-00C04F6BDF0D")]
public interface Ray : IRay, IGeometry
